name: Sunday Worship Experience
prompt_template: Design a vibrant church event flyer with a smooth gradient blending soft pink on the left and light blue on the right. Church name: "{church_name}" at top left. Main title: Bold "{event_title}" in dark purple / orange-yellow gradient. Speakers: {speakers_section}. Host: {host}. Theme: {theme}. Date: {date} in maroon box. Time: {time}. Venue: {venue}. Social: {social}.
